data.title: Luxfer Holdings Non-GAAP EPS of $0.27, revenue of $83.9M; raises FY26 outlook
data.description:
• Luxfer Holdings press release (LXFR): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.27.
  • Revenue of $83.9M (-13.5% Y/Y).
  • Adjusted EBITDA1 increased to $12.3 million, up 8.8%.
  • 2026 guidance raised, increasing Adj Diluted EPS midpoint to $1.17 from ~$1.12 vs. consensus of $1.12.
  • Material step-up expected in 2027, with robust double-digit earnings growth.

data.title: ASE Technology GAAP EPADS of NT$0.195, revenue of NT$173.66B
data.description:
• ASE Technology press release (ASX): Q1 GAAP EPADS of NT$0.195.
  • Revenue of NT$173.66B (+17.2% Y/Y).
  • Gross margin increased by 0.6 percentage points to 20.1% in 1Q26 from 19.5% in 4Q25.
  • Operating margin was 10.1% in 1Q26, compared to 9.9% in 4Q25.

data.title: Arc Resources reports Q1 results
data.description:
• Arc Resources press release (AETUF): Q1 net income of C$584 million ($1.03 per share)
  • Revenue of C$1.95B (vs. 1.632B last year)

data.title: Aena SME S.A. ADR reports Q1 results
data.description:
• Aena SME S.A. ADR press release (ANYYY): Q1 net profit of 329.4M euros in the first quarter of 2026, compared to 301.3M euros in the same period last year.
  • Total revenue exceeds 1,479.9 million euros, 11.6% up on the first three months of 2025
  • The gross operating profit EBITDA stood at 661.1 million euros, with a margin of 44.7%. This figure represents a growth of 2.7% compared to 2025 (643.6 million).

data.title: Wal-Mart de Mexico gives Q1 numbers
data.description:
• Wal-Mart de Mexico press release (WMMVY): Q1 GAAP EPS of MXN0.72.
  • Revenue of MXN243.26B (+1.7% Y/Y).
  • Same -store sales growth of 3.1% in Mexico and 0.9 % in Central America.• Mexico : ticket grew 4.0 % and traffic -0.9 %.• CAM: ticket grew 1.2% and traffic -0.3%

data.title: KONE Oyj reports Q1 results
data.description:
• KONE Oyj press release (KNYJF): Q1 GAAP EPS of €0.41.
  • Revenue of €2.71B (+1.5% Y/Y).

data.title: Iberdrola reports Q1 results
data.description:
• Iberdrola press release (IBDSF): Q1 net profit increased to €1.865B up ~11% Y/Y
  • Revenue of €12.02B (-0.2% Y/Y).

data.title: Oruka Therapeutics prices upsized $700M public offering at $72.50 per share
AstraZeneca beats top-line and bottom-line estimates; reaffirms FY26 outlook
data.description:
• AstraZeneca PLC press release (AZN): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of $2.58 beats by $1.31.
  • Revenue of $15.29B (+12.5% Y/Y) beats by $370M.
  • Core operating profit increased 12%.
  • Core tax rate of 21%. Expectations for full year Core Tax rate are unchanged at 18-22%.
  • Guidance: AstraZeneca reconfirms total revenue and core EPS guidance for FY 2026 at CER, based on the average foreign exchange rates through 2025. Total revenue is expected to increase by a mid-to-high single-digit percentage vs. estimated growth of 7.56% Y/Y. Core EPS is expected to increase by a low double-digit percentage vs. estimated growth of 12.04% Y/Y. The core tax rate is expected to be between 18% and 22%.

data.title: PureTech reports FY results, will delist ADS from Nasdaq
data.description:
• PureTech press release (PRTC): FY  Consolidated cash, cash equivalents and short-term investments of $277.3M as of December 31, 2025.
  • As of March 31, 2026, PureTech level cash and cash equivalents were $248.1M.
  • The company also announced that it has notified Nasdaq of its intention to voluntarily delist its ADSs, each representing the right to receive 10 ordinary shares of the company.
  • After delisting, PureTech’s (PRTC) ordinary shares will remain listed on the London Stock Exchange, which will continue to serve as the company's primary trading venue.
